title: Sinusoidal Functions
content:
« Previous | Next »
Session Overview Euler’s formula describes how sinusoidal functions go hand in hand with complex numbers. In addition, we will often use sinusoidal functions as input to our systems. This session lays out the terms and formulas we will need when working with these functions.
